near_term.headline: FY26 Revenue Guidance Delivered
near_term.claim: FY26 standalone/consolidated turnover came in at INR1,157cr, which management confirmed matched the guidance issued at the start of the year.
near_term.quote: As mentioned, we achieved turnover of INR1157 crores, delivering at par with the guidance given in the beginning of the year

near_term.headline: Near-Dated Flagship Programme Orders
near_term.claim: The QRSAM contract (via BEL) is expected around June 2026, and the Uttam AESA radar order under negotiation with HAL is expected in Q2 or Q3 FY27.
near_term.quote: we are expecting, you know, this particular order sometime in the Q2 or Q3

medium_term.headline: FY27 Revenue Guidance
medium_term.claim: Management has planned standalone sales of INR1,300-1,400cr for FY27 (~15-20% YoY growth over FY26's INR1,157cr).
medium_term.quote: planned to book sales of INR1300 crores to INR1400 crores, that is around 15% to 20% growth compared to FY26, covering 40% of R&D and 60% from the production area

medium_term.headline: ARC (JV) FY27 Growth Target
medium_term.claim: The JV/subsidiary Astra Rafael Comsys is guided to grow order booking and sales by a minimum of 50% in FY27, with sales expected to cross INR600cr versus INR360cr in FY26.
medium_term.quote: we expect the minimum growth of 50% both in terms of order booking and as well as sales. As on date, we have visibility of INR200 crores order book in FY27 for ARC and also expected to cross INR600 crores sales

long_term.headline: Multi-Year Revenue Tripling Target
long_term.claim: First flagged as ~INR7,500cr+ cumulative sales over 4 years (Q3 FY26), reiterated on the Q4 FY26 call as nearly tripling FY26 turnover within 4.5-5.5 years (~FY30-31).
long_term.quote: structurally positioned to nearly triple its turnover over this period
long_term.source: Q3 FY26 concall (13 Feb 2026); Q4 FY26 concall (27 May 2026)

long_term.headline: Higher-Value Export Mix via ARC/Rafael Co-Development
long_term.claim: Exports are shifting from older, lower-value offset-based work to RF co-development with Rafael on software-defined radios.
long_term.quote: these are the things where the RF portion of the SDRs are being co-developed between Rafael and Astra

long_term.headline: Uttam AESA Radar DRDO Qualification
long_term.claim: The DRDO qualification timeline for the Uttam AESA radar slipped from a ~6-month hope (Feb 2026) to FY28 (May 2026).
long_term.quote: in maybe FY28, DRDO will be ready to qualify the overall radar
long_term.source: Q4 FY26 concall, 27 May 2026 (supersedes Q3 FY26 expectation)

note: Built for the first full research_cache run of this skill for astra_microwave. See output/astra_microwave/Astra_Microwave_Products_report.md for the full report.
